title: Venue
doc_html:
§3203.  Venue

A suit on a cause of action described in R.S. 13:3201 may be instituted in the parish where the plaintiff is domiciled, or in any parish of proper venue.

Added by Acts 1964, No. 47, §3; Acts 1997, No. 1056, §2.
doc_text:
§3203.  Venue
A suit on a cause of action described in R.S. 13:3201 may be instituted in the parish where the plaintiff is domiciled, or in any parish of proper venue.
Added by Acts 1964, No. 47, §3; Acts 1997, No. 1056, §2.
